prompt: Hero is on the button and villain is in the big blind. Who is in position after the flop?
intro_v1: Read the seat relationship first. Position means acting later after the flop, not just sitting somewhere else.
why_v1: The button acts later after the flop, so hero keeps position.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero is in position because the button acts later after the flop.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Hero is in position here because the button acts after the big blind.
